xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NoteForNonApplicabilityOfTheDi: Not applicable as the Bank has not made any default on loans and debt securities during the reporting period.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DisclosureOfNotesOnFinancialRe: Please refer outcome of Board Meeting for notes.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DisclosureOfNotesOnSegmentsExp:
*Digital Banking Segment reported as a sub-segment of Retail Banking Segment is related to Digital Banking Units (DBUs) of the bank. As at September 30, 2025, the Bank has two DBU’s.

Business Segments have been identified and reported taking into account the target customer profile, the nature of products and services, the differing risks and returns, the organisation structure, the internal business reporting system and guidelines prescribed by the RBI and in compliance with the Accounting Standard 17 – “Segment Reporting”. The business operations of the Bank are in India and for the purpose of segment reporting as per Accounting Standard-17 (Segment reporting) the bank is considered to operate only in domestic segment.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RelationshipOfTheCounterpartyW: Related Enterprise of Promoters/Executive Directors and their relatives
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RemarksOnApprovalByAuditCommit: CSR Contribution as approved by CSR Committee and Board
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RelatedPartyTransactionExplana: Notes for all transactions disclosed: 1. The disclosure on Related Party Transactions is pursuant to regulation 23(9) of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ("Listing Regulations") and transactions which are exempted from RPT definition or disclosure pursuant to Listing Regulations and Circular(s) issued thereunder are not included in the above disclosure. 2. Value of the Related Party Transaction as approved by the Audit Committee represents omnibus limit approved by the Audit Committee, wherever applicable. 3.Acceptance of fixed deposits by the Bank are at the terms uniformly applicable/offered to all shareholders/public. 4. Amount "0.00" represents less than Rs. 500.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RelationshipOfTheCounterpartyW: Relatives of MD & CEO and ED
